subcodes.first_line: God beareth witness that there is none other God but Him. His is the sovereignty and dominion, the might and the majesty. He doeth whatsoever He willeth and ordaineth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو له الملک و الملکوت و العزه و الجبروت یفعل و یحکم و
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @praise and encouragement
